B.Tech 3 Year, Maharashtra
Saturday
~Arif Shaikh
:  *To Every Student of BTech 2026* Today is the day. Your last exam paper as a student. Think about how far you've come — your first day on campus when everything felt new , the friends who became like family , the late nights before submissions , the subjects that felt impossible but you still passed, and the small moments of pride only you remember. Every assignment, every project, every tough exam — it all brought you here, to this last paper today. No matter how the paper goes, remember this: *you made it this far, and that is a big achievement.* You are not the same person who joined four years ago. You have grown, learned, and you are ready for what comes next. Today is not just the end of an exam. It is the end of one chapter and the start of a new one. Whatever dreams you have carried through these years — may they come true. May your future bring success, good people around you, and strength to face new challenges. This is not the end of who you are. It is the beginning of who you will become. *Best wishes to the whole Class of 2026.* Finish this last paper with confidence — and then go start your new journey. # BTech2026 Get all Updated and Instant Notices on WhatsApp channel*  https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029Va9h9VZ35fLo6rykj30u

You reacted to: "NIELIT, Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar offers Work Based Learning Programme in the following domains: VLSI Design, Electronic Product Design, System on Chip Design, Social Mobile Analytics, Embedded Systems & IoT, Drone UAS Technology, AI and Data Science. The selected candidates will be mentored by the scientists and experts of NIELIT.  Number of Vacancies- 11 Nos (SC: 3, ST: 1, EWS: 5 & Women: 2) Number of vacancies may vary, depending on the requirements of the centre.  Eligibility: Candidates passed out Graduate Engineers or equivalent, M.Sc. or M.C.A. in last 3 years, with following specializations are eligible: 1. B.E. or B.Tech (any discipline) and engineering graduates 2. M.Sc. (any discipline) 3. Master of Computer Applications (M.C.A). Final year students can also apply. Perks 1. Incumbents would gain rich experience of working on live State Level and National Level initiatives. 2. Stipend- Rs 10,000 per month Who can apply? Only those candidates can apply who are from B.Tech. / B.E./ Equivalent,M.Sc,MCA, and specialisation from Any MCA, are available for duration of 6 Months have relevant skills and interests."
